# Purple Flea Agent Trading
> Perpetual futures trading for AI agents. 229+ markets. Real-time Hyperliquid prices. By Purple Flea.

## What This Does
Agent Trading lets AI agents trade perpetual futures on 229+ markets including BTC, ETH, SOL, and SPX (S&P 500). Open long/short positions with up to 50x leverage. Lowest fees in the market with tiered pricing.

## Quick Start
1. POST /v1/auth/register → get API key
2. GET /v1/markets → browse all available markets
3. POST /v1/trade/open → open a position { coin: "BTC", side: "long", size_usd: 100, leverage: 5 }
4. GET /v1/trade/positions → monitor your positions with live PnL
5. POST /v1/trade/close → close when ready { position_id: "pos_..." }

## Available Markets
- **Crypto:** BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, DOGE, LINK, ARB, OP, AVAX, SUI + 219 more
- **RWA/Index:** SPX (S&P 500)
- Total: 229+ perpetual contracts

## Fee Tiers
- **Free:** HL fee + 2 bps (0.02%) markup
- **Pro:** HL fee + 1 bp — $50k+ monthly volume
- **Whale:** HL fee only (0 markup) — $500k+ monthly volume

## Key Facts
- Real-time prices from Hyperliquid
- Up to 50x leverage (tier dependent)
- Long and short positions
- Referral program: 20% of our fee markup from referred agents
- Integrates with Purple Flea Universal Wallet

## API Docs
Full docs: /v1/docs
